name: Business/local/content owner evidence package
decision: R-7 converts the remaining local, service, product, review, media, and policy evidence gaps into an owner-facing evidence package. The repo has a centralized businessProfile source and improved service/product content scaffolding, but Mitra is not local/content growth-ready until accountable owners provide GBP, citation, service, product, review, media, and legal/policy proof or approve removing unsupported claims.

required_evidence: Signed or owner-approved fact record for public name, legal name, Y-tunnus, address, phone, email, website URL, service area, regular hours, and special-hours process.
Decision on canonical customer email because public snippets previously showed old Gmail addresses.
Decision on one canonical public booking URL and UTM policy.
owner_packets.acceptance: Website, footer, contact page, LocalBusiness schema, GBP, and citations match the owner-approved facts or recorded platform formatting differences.

required_evidence: GBP ownership and verification status.

GBP business information: profile name, primary category, additional categories, address, service area, phone, website URL, regular hours, special hours, services/products, attributes, booking link, messaging state, photos, reviews, duplicate/suspension status.
Citation correction proof for Finder, Fonecta, Proff or equivalent, AutoJerry, autokorjaamo.fi, Facebook, Apple Maps, Bing Places, and active Finnish automotive directories.
owner_packets.acceptance: C-1 blocked GBP/citation items are reconciled and no profile uses keyword-stuffed names, fake locations, copied reviews, or stale contact data.

required_evidence: Named reviewer for safety-sensitive automotive pages.
Owner-approved service availability, prices, duration ranges, inclusions, exclusions, aftercare, warranty/complaint terms, and escalation limits.
Original process/workshop media or explicit decision to remove proof claims that cannot be supported.
owner_packets.acceptance: Every P1 service page has owner-approved proof, reviewer, update trigger, and no unsupported safety, warranty, roadworthiness, refrigerant, emissions, or repair-standard claim.

required_evidence: Shipping, pickup, installation, returns, warranty, used-condition, supplier-stock, delivery-time, and cancellation policies.
Fitment authority and escalation process for tire/rim compatibility.
Product owner review of category landing candidates before any indexable category expansion.
owner_packets.acceptance: Product page, Product/Offer schema, Merchant feed, cart, checkout, and policy pages agree; no richer shipping/return/review schema is added before policy proof exists.

owner_packets.packet: Reviews, testimonials, ratings, and trust claims
required_evidence: Review source, permission, moderation, date, and eligibility record for any visible review or testimonial.
Proof for visible trust claims such as ratings, customer counts, certified technicians, modern equipment, waiting room amenities, and insurance coverage.
Review-request and response SOP with no incentives, gating, or selective suppression.
owner_packets.acceptance: Unsupported visible ratings/testimonials/trust claims are either supported with owner evidence and compliant display rules or removed/rewritten. LocalBusiness review/rating schema remains absent unless eligibility is proven.

required_evidence: Owned or licensed workshop, exterior, interior, team, equipment, tire hotel, product, and service-process images/videos.
Consent and rights record for people, vehicles, license plates, customer data, and supplier/product media.
Mapping of each media asset to pages, alt text intent, and refresh trigger.
owner_packets.acceptance: Local/service/product pages use real representative media where proof is claimed; stock-like or generic media is not treated as first-party evidence.

required_evidence: Search Console query/page evidence when access exists.
GBP calls, directions, website clicks, service/product interactions, and review themes.
Booking, phone, support, site-search, and sales questions grouped by service/product intent.
Owner-approved priorities for guides and category landing pages.
owner_packets.acceptance: New guides, city/service-area pages, and category landings are created only from distinct user need, business capacity, and original evidence; no doorway or keyword-permutation pages.

proof_sensitive_source_findings.finding: P1 service pages already show owner-review caveats and source notes, but owner review has not been supplied.
proof_sensitive_source_findings.evidence: src/i18n/dictionaries/serviceSeo.ts contains 14 Business/service owner review markers.

proof_sensitive_source_findings.finding: Visible site/trust dictionaries include review/rating and customer-count claims that need provenance or removal before growth-ready classification.
proof_sensitive_source_findings.evidence: src/i18n/dictionaries/site.ts and src/i18n/dictionaries/common.ts contain reviews.rating, common.review.*, and Over 500 satisfied customers text.

proof_sensitive_source_findings.finding: Tire hotel insurance and liability claims conflict in source and require owner/legal proof before being used as public trust evidence.
proof_sensitive_source_findings.evidence: src/i18n/dictionaries/site.ts claims comprehensive included insurance; src/i18n/dictionaries/legal.ts also includes optional/customer-risk wording.

proof_sensitive_source_findings.finding: Warranty, waiting-room, certified technician, modern equipment, and similar trust claims require owner evidence.
proof_sensitive_source_findings.evidence: src/i18n/dictionaries/site.ts, src/components/site/pages/CarServicePage.tsx, src/components/site/pages/FAQPage.tsx, and ServicesPage trust-signal usage.

proof_sensitive_source_findings.finding: Product review schema remains disabled correctly, but visible product review fields may still render when product data contains ratings.
proof_sensitive_source_findings.evidence: C-4 report and src/components/catalog/ProductDetailPage.tsx review UI references.

blockers.blocker: GBP and citation owner evidence remains unavailable.
blockers.required_resolution: Provide the C-1 GBP/citation evidence package and reconcile source facts, profile facts, and directory facts.

blockers.blocker: Service-owner and subject-matter review remains unavailable for safety-sensitive service pages.
blockers.required_resolution: Approve or revise P1 service content, provide reviewer identity/update trigger, and supply original process evidence or remove unsupported claims.

blockers.blocker: Product, policy, review, and trust-claim proof remains unavailable.
blockers.required_resolution: Approve commerce policies, review/testimonial provenance, insurance/warranty claims, customer-count claims, and product/category evidence before richer schema or growth claims.

blockers.blocker: Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, and customer-research evidence remains unavailable.
blockers.required_resolution: Provide platform readback or sanitized exports so content priorities are evidence-led rather than assumed.

next: R-8 - Post-remediation live crawl, browser smoke, and drift rerun
